facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this one. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books sits right on the water with books on the shelves and zero crowds. Coffee, tea, a river view, and a chair you won't want to leave. 4.7 stars from 81 reviews and most visitors still haven't heard of it. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: River running past your table. Books within reach. Coffee in hand. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books is the slow morning Phu Quoc doesn't advertise. 4.7 stars. Still quiet.

instagram.caption: Tourists keep walking past this riverside café. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books. 4.7★, books, zero crowds. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: River view. Good coffee. Nobody here. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books deserves more noise than it gets.
